disclaimer: Unofficial, community-maintained figures. Prices are best-effort and may lag behind GitHub's official numbers. Verify against the official documentation before purchasing.

overage.note: Additional AI Credits beyond the included pool are billed per credit (usage-based billing).

fx.note: Azure's fixed monthly billing rate, applied uniformly to USD prices. Displayed with round half-up (2dp) to match the official pricing calculator. Not a live market FX rate.

pppNote: PPP = GitHub Pre-Purchase Plan. Commit units (1 CU = 1 USD of GitHub usage) are bought upfront for a one-year term at published tiers: P1 = 20,000 CU ($19,000, 5% off), P2 = 100,000 CU ($90,000, 10% off), P3 = 500,000 CU ($425,000, 15% off). Tiers can be bought in multiples (quantity). Pricing as of June 2026 and is subject to change; review the latest Azure documentation before purchasing. Pre-Purchase discounts do not combine with other discounts.
